ref-grid-desc.plaintext: The following examples show how to render a Grid block on your own frontend. Use the schema to register the block, the JSON as a reference for the data structure, and the React or Vue snippets as a starting point for your component.

children.text: The following examples show how to render a Grid block on your own frontend. Use the schema to register the block, the JSON as a reference for the data structure, and the React or Vue snippets as a starting point for your component.

description: The Grid block allows adding multi-column blocks. A grid block can contain between one and four columns of different blocks. Teasers and images can be added in a grid block.
title: Grid
